data.title: China's Central Bank Halts Bond Purchases to Support Yuan
data.description:
• The PBOC decides to stop government bond purchases.
  • The decision seems aimed at stopping the slide in yields and CNY.
  • Early this week, analysts referred to the CNY depreciation as a bullish factor for crypto.

data.title: The Bitcoin Iceberg: Buyers Await Beneath The Bearish Surface
data.description:
• The market depth at the quote level and from quote level to 1% shows seller dominance.
  • But increased demand is seen at greater depth levels.

data.title: Bitcoin Heads to $90K as Crypto Selloff Gathers Steam
data.description:
• Bitcoin has returned to levels not seen in more than one month.
  • SOL and LINK were notable underperformers among altcoins.
  • The selling comes ahead of Friday morning's job report, which, if strong, might have markets eliminating the idea of any Fed rate cuts in 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin Gives Up Gains Post New Year-Spiral, But $120K Bets Still Remain Hot
data.description:
• BTC has erased the new year gains with inflation-adjusted yields hitting multi-month highs.
  • Deribit-listed options continue to show a strong bullish bias.

data.title: MANTRA Blockchain to Tokenize $1B of Real-World Assets for UAE-Based Property Firm DAMAC
data.description:
• MANTRA will tokenize at least $1 billion worth of property developer DAMAC Group's assets in early 2025, the companies said Thursday.
  • DAMAC's portfolio encompasses real estate developments firms, hospitality and data centers, and started accepting crypto payments in 2022.
  • Earlier this week, President-elect Donald Trump said that DAMAC laid out plans for a $20 billion investment in data centers.

data.title: Gemini Appoints New Leadership Team in Europe to Boost Expansion
data.description:
• Gemini plans to expand it Europe and has appointed a new senior management team.
  • Mark Jennings has joined the crypto exchange as the new head of Europe and Daniel Slutzkin as U.K. head.

data.title: Market Fears of Potential Selling Pressure From Possible Silk Road Sale is Overblown: Van Straten
data.description:
• Unconfirmed reports that the Department of Justice has the green light to sell 69,370 BTC.
  • This type of event has already happened last year when the German Government sold around 50,000 BTC.
  • Long-term holders have sold around 1 million bitcoin since September to show how big the market is.

data.title: Cardano’s ADA Slumps 8% as Traders Await Trump Catalyst for Bitcoin Gains
data.description:
• Cardano’s ADA led losses among major cryptocurrencies as Bitcoin weakened, with no immediate signs of recovery.
  • The focus is on upcoming U.S. economic data, particularly the FOMC and NFP reports, which could further dictate Bitcoin's price movement.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Suffer $582M Net Outflow, Second-Highest Tally Ever
data.description:
• BTC and ETH ETFs saw outflows worth $582 million and $159 million on Wednesday.
  • BTC dropped as low as $92,500 at one point.
  • Fed minutes showed concerns about the inflationary impact of Trump's policies.

data.title: XRP May Surge 40% as ‘Trump Effect’ Boosts Ripple Sentiment
data.description:
• XRP has formed a "descending triangle" pattern since its peak near $2.9 in early December. According to technical analysis, a bullish breakout from this pattern could lead to a 40% or more price increase, resuming the upward trend from early November when XRP was near 50 cents.
  • The expectation of a crypto-friendly policy under Trump, following his election, has led to a significant price surge in XRP, increasing over 300% since November.
  • Social sentiment has also been positive, with higher optimism for XRP compared to bitcoin and ether, according to Santiment.
